name: batch_get_feishu_sheet_values
description: Reads values from multiple cell ranges in one request.

ranges.description: Array of cell ranges to read in one request (required). Examples: "A1:C10" (active sheet), "{sheetId}!A1:C10" (specific sheet by ID), "Sheet1!A1:C10" (specific sheet by title). For multi-sheet spreadsheets, always prefix with sheetId or sheet title to avoid ambiguity.
